mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, password, name, role, phone, email, total_fines, patronCategoryId, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email}, 0, #{patronCategoryId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name=#{name}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE users SET total_fines = total_fines + #{amount} WHERE id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'reader'
